LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-26-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HAILEY VEEDER'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT IS GRANTED; PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY THE TRANSFER COSTS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. CONOR WALSH, Esq. of Countrywide Trial Lawyers, APLC (tel: 213-493-6003) for Plaintiff Jacquesha Jurado.
Atty. CHANEL ARAUJO, Esq. of Cullins & Grandy LLP (tel: 949-454-2500) for Defendant Hailey R. Veeder.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT HAILEY VEEDER's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to transfer venue to Santa Clara County Superior Court is granted; plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
